# Idaho Grants Finder

## What this sleeve does
Idaho Grants Finder is a finance-domain sleeve focused on identifying grant opportunities relevant to Idaho applicants across federal, state, local, foundation, and private funding sources.

## NeoStacks in this sleeve
- `S.01` Federal Grant Research Stack
- `S.02` Idaho State Grant Research Stack
- `S.03` Local Government Grant Research Stack
- `S.04` Foundation & Private Grant Research Stack
- `S.05` Grant Eligibility Assessment Stack
- `S.06` Application Strategy & Writing Support Stack
- `S.07` Deadline & Tracking Management Stack
- `S.08` Compliance & Reporting Guidance Stack

## NeoBlocks in this sleeve
The extracted public structure currently shows at least:
- `N.01.01` Grants.gov Search and Filtering
- `N.01.03` USDA Rural Development Grants (Idaho Focus)

## MOLT blocks inside the extracted NeoBlocks
- `TRG.GRANT.001` Federal Grant Search Required
- `DIR.GRANT.001` Execute Comprehensive Federal Grant Search
- `INST.FEDERAL.001` Grants.gov Search Procedure
- `SUBJ.FEDERAL.001` Grants.gov System Knowledge
- `PHIL.FEDERAL.001` Federal Grant Philosophy
- `BP.FEDERAL.001` Federal Grant Search Blueprint
- `TRG.GRANT.003` USDA Rural Development Search
- `DIR.GRANT.003` Identify USDA Opportunities for Rural Idaho
- `INST.USDA.001` USDA Rural Development Search
- `SUBJ.USDA.001` USDA Rural Development Programs

## Notes
This sleeve is a public finance/grants research sleeve with Idaho-specific focus and a strong practical search/eligibility posture.
